# v0.1.12

## 更新说明

- 修复大账号池巡检时，假超时可能导致 host/CGO 调用堆积、内存持续上涨的问题（[#11](https://github.com/ywddd/grok-inspection/issues/11)）
- 限制同时进行的底层 host 调用数量；超时返回后，未结束的底层调用仍占用名额，避免无限堆积
- 超时账号改为主轮结束后单独低并发复检，降低慢账号占满主并发的影响
- 实测：约 3500 账号、16 并发全量巡检可正常跑完，内存与线程保持稳定

## English

- Fix memory growth during large-pool inspection caused by soft timeouts leaving host/CGO calls unbounded ([#11](https://github.com/ywddd/grok-inspection/issues/11))
- Cap concurrent host calls; abandoned timed-out work still holds a slot until the host returns
- Timed-out accounts are retried in a separate lower-concurrency phase after the primary pass
- Verified with ~3500 accounts at 16 workers: full inspection completed with stable memory and thread count
